inputs.label: Bonus Amount
inputs.businessContext: The gross bonus amount before any tax deductions.

businessContext_i18n.en: The gross bonus amount before any tax deductions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir vergi kesintisinden önceki brüt bonus tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant brut du bonus avant toute déduction fiscale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Importe bruto del bono antes de cualquier deducción fiscal.

inputs.label: Federal Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Federal income tax withholding rate applied to bonuses (percent).

businessContext_i18n.en: Federal income tax withholding rate applied to bonuses (percent).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkramiyelere uygulanan federal gelir vergisi stopaj oranı (yüzde).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de retenue d'impôt fédéral sur le revenu appliqué aux bonus (pourcentage).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de retención del impuesto federal sobre la renta aplicada a los bonos (porcentaje).

inputs.label: Social Security Rate
inputs.businessContext: Social Security tax rate on bonuses (percent).

businessContext_i18n.en: Social Security tax rate on bonuses (percent).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkramiyelere uygulanan Sosyal Güvenlik vergi oranı (yüzde).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de taxe de sécurité sociale sur les bonus (pourcentage).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa del impuesto de Seguridad Social sobre los bonos (porcentaje).

businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de taxe Medicare sur les bonus (pourcentage).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa del impuesto de Medicare sobre los bonos (porcentaje).

inputs.label: State Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: State income tax withholding rate on bonuses (percent).

businessContext_i18n.en: State income tax withholding rate on bonuses (percent).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkramiyelere uygulanan eyalet gelir vergisi stopaj oranı (yüzde).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der staatlichen Einkommensteuer auf Boni.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de retenue d'impôt sur le revenu de l'État sur les bonus (pourcentage).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de retención del impuesto estatal sobre la renta sobre los bonos (porcentaje).
